description: Material delete resolves BOM component blockers to concrete recipe/product names
detail: A bom_line count alone is not enough for a user to fix the blocker

description: Material delete resolves BOM product blockers when the material is the finished product
detail: The product side of BOM must be explained too

description: Delete-item blocker message names recipes and tells the user to edit/delete the BOM recipe
detail: The resolution must be actionable, not only diagnostic

description: Usage summary carries bom refs while blocking_total sums only numeric blockers
detail: List-valued details must not corrupt blocking_total

description: Product gateway/service expose a BOM usage resolver without UI SQL
detail: UI/application code should use product gateway/service boundaries

description: The delete_item raise block does not leak raw bom_line/invoice_line identifiers
detail: Users must see business language, not physical table names
